reason: Spec compliance baseline: no dead code, no test mocks of internal contracts, code-reuse, naming.
Verify Chinese error context, restore-on-failure orchestration is wired (POV prepare failure must roll back gameinfo + plugin DLL).
Regression guard — gameinfo health contract from PR #15 (closure-driven detection/repair, no asymmetric paths) must remain green and the message stays generic.
If POV path logs anything, sanitization + trace fields contract must hold.
Type safety, naming, no hand-edit of auto-generated files.
SettingsPanel.vue style consistency with existing checkboxes.
zh-CN.json key naming + only zh-CN modified.
ClipSettings round-trip and reactive binding pattern correctly applied.
